title: stevia pauciradiata
intro: Stevia pauciradiata, also known as the paraguayan sweetleaf, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the subtropical regions of South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves have been used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as to lower blood pressure and improve blood sugar control. Herbal preparations of Stevia pauciradiata are often used in traditional medicine, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
